cuts.reason: Dawn-corral fades in under the final punch line at 0:06, slow zoom holds through vo-intro. Warm 5500K grade per production note. PostVisit hospital-exterior bookend pattern.
Market context cut 1: 'Beef · record highs'. Wide grazing read as 'business as usual', undermined by overlay claim. Hard cut into next.
Stand-in for fence-line-dusk (SOURCE.md gap #5). Lightning-night gives ominous low-key cover for 'Cow herd · 65-yr low'.
Empty meadow under 'Labor · gone'. Quiet landscape that reads as absence, not abundance.
NM high-desert flyover under 'Eyes · fewer per acre'. Scale = vastness = the impossibility of human coverage.
Hold the 'rancher does not' line over a herd-countryside shot. Forces the contrast — the herd is the thing that's connected; the rancher isn't.
Dashboard establish under vo-bridge — 'So we built one'. Slow vertical pan, wordmark fade-in. Bridges narrative into demo without hard cut.
Substance act over warm dust-graded drone aerial. Three text blocks fade in over: 1106 tests, Ed25519 chain, fresh-clone < 3 min. CrossBeam suburban-drone close pattern.
